title: Metis
description: A PvP modpack similar to clients like Lunar
body:
Metis is a preconfigured PvP modpack designed to be a more open and easy to use alternative to Minecraft Clients such as Lunar, Badlion, and LabyMod. It adds a variety of features and is far more optimized than even OptiFine.

Mods

Included Mods

  • 5zig: A mod that (among other things) adds a customizable HUD

  • Custom Main Menu: A mod that enables configuration of the main menu via a json file

  • MinecraftCapes: A mod that allows you to have custom capes for free; to setup, simply go to minecraftcapes.net and follow the instructions

  • NoFov: A mod that disables dynamic FOV without the use of OptiFine

  • Old Animations: A mod that adds the 1.7 animations in 1.8.9

  • Overlays: A mod that adds an overlay showing the user's key presses

  • Patcher: A mod that optimizes the game and fixes bugs found in vanilla

  • Resource Loader: An extension of Custom Main Menu that allows it to have custom resources

  • Scrollable Tooltips: A mod that allows you to scroll through long tooltips menus such as the ones in SkyWars

  • SimpleToggleSprint: A mod that allows you to not constantly have to press left ctrl

  • TNT Time: A mod that gives a timer for TNT detonation above the block

  • ReplayMod: A mod that records gameplay in unique ways
